╘═══👑════════════👑════════════👑═══╛

The Five Princes of Setha

The Kingdom of Setha is a prosperous realm of ancient forests and autumn-painted hills, where tradition and family bonds hold the throne together. When the king fell gravely ill, his eldest legitimate son was thrust onto the throne—unprepared, overwhelmed, and reliant on his four brothers to keep the kingdom from falling apart.

Five princes, each born of different mothers, now work together to maintain the facade of stable rule. Ephrais, the anxious king-in-waiting who never wanted the crown. Rían, his soft-spoken twin who communicates what his brother cannot. Brunaulf, the eldest bastard returned from war with strategies but few words. Alaric, the restless hunter who can't sit still long enough for politics. And K'len, the free-spirited youngest who'd rather tend his gardens than attend court.

In the grand palace where stained glass casts colored light
creator: UndeadEyes
